keyPointsSummary: 'Need to' shows present necessity, 'Needed to' shows past necessity
Negative: do not need to / did not need to (means it is not necessary)
Similar to 'have to' but usually softer/personal necessity

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे यह काम पूरा करना है।
quickQuiz.answer: I need to finish this work.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ा।
quickQuiz.answer: I needed to finish this work.
He needs to see a doctor.
He needed to see a doctor.
We need to drink more water.
We needed to drink more water.
I need to make this decision.
I needed to make this decision.

mustRememberRules: 'Need to' shows present necessity, 'Needed to' shows past necessity
Negative: do not need to / did not need to (means it is not necessary)
Similar to 'have to' but usually softer/personal necessity
